description: stories.yaml — an open specification for software requirements, enforced by CI.
name: io.github.jonybur/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Optional: Locus API key for cloud team sync. Prefix ptmcp_. Not required for local stories.yaml mode.
environmentVariables.name: PROTOTYPER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional: Locus project UUID for cloud team sync.
environmentVariables.name: PROTOTYPER_PROJECT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Optional: Explicit path to stories.yaml. Defaults to auto-discovery from project root.
environmentVariables.name: LOCUS_STORIES_PATH
